channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: 31 New Equity-Focused ETFs Launched in Canada in March, Including Brian Belski's Humilis Funds
item.description: Amid March's market volatility driven by Middle East tensions that pushed Brent crude above US$100 per barrel, commodity-focused ETFs led gains, with SavvyLong Geared Crude Oil ETF (OILU-T) surging 14...

item.title: China's South China Sea Strategy Echoes Iran's Strait of Hormuz Tactics
item.description: The article discusses China's aggressive actions in the South China Sea, particularly its firing of flares at a Philippine Coast Guard aircraft over Panganiban and Zamora reefs on April 9, 2026. These...

item.title: Tanzania Signs $3 Billion Deal to Assemble Gas-Powered Heavy Trucks and Other Products in Bagamoyo
item.description: Tanzania is set to start assembling its first heavy-duty lorries powered by compressed natural gas by the end of 2026. This follows a huge Sh7.8 trillion which is about $3 billion investment for a new...

item.title: Health Canada Warns Against Injecting Peptides Bought Online
item.description: Health Canada has issued a warning about the dangers of injecting peptides purchased online, citing serious health risks. Peptides, often marketed for anti-aging, weight loss, bodybuilding, and athlet...

item.title: Diocletian: The Roman Emperor Who Voluntarily Retired
item.description: Diocletian, a Roman emperor who ruled from 284 to 305 CE, stands out in history for voluntarily stepping down from power, a rarity among Roman rulers. Unlike many emperors who met violent ends—such as...

item.title: Authorities detain man following tragic English Channel crossing attempt
item.description: A man has been taken into custody following the deaths of four individuals who attempted to cross the English Channel. The incident highlights the ongoing dangers faced by migrants and others attempti...

item.title: Hip-Hop Pioneer Afrika Bambaataa Passes Away at 68
item.description: Afrika Bambaataa, the legendary New York rapper and one of the founding figures of hip-hop, has died at the age of 68. Known for his pioneering influence in the development of hip-hop culture during t...

item.title: BSF Constable Dies in Ukhrul Amid Local Tensions
item.description: In a tragic incident in Manipur's Ukhrul district, Constable Mithun Mandal of the Border Security Force (BSF) was shot and killed while on routine patrol at Mongkot Chepu. Chief Minister Yumnam Khemch...

item.title: The Importance of Alikiba and Diamond Platnumz's Rivalry in Tanzanian Music
item.description: Alikiba and Diamond Platnumz have been central figures in Tanzania's music industry for over a decade, with their rivalry becoming a defining element of Bongo Flava. While many fans have polarized vie...

item.title: Exploring Nova Scotia’s lobster-rich culture and coastal charm
item.description: Julietta Jameson’s travel piece takes readers on a food-focused journey through Nova Scotia, an Atlantic province in Canada where lobster is a part of everyday life rather than a luxury. She begins he...

item.title: Eric Oluwole Resigns as ADC Vice Chairman in Ondo Over Leadership Crisis
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) for Ondo State dey face serious crisis as the Vice Chairman, Eric Oluwole, don officially resign from the party. In him resignation letter wey e write on 3rd Apri...

item.title: Pete Hegseth’s Religious Beliefs and US Policy in the Iran Conflict
item.description: The article examines US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth’s evangelical Christian faith and its influence on the ongoing war with Iran. Hegseth, a Calvinist from the Communion of Reformed Evangelical Chu...

item.title: Queue Marshal Irene Sondezi Spreads Joy and Improves Patient Experience at Pholosong Hospital
item.description: Pholosong Regional Hospital in Tsakane, often criticised for long queues and service delays, has a bright spot in the form of 55-year-old Irene Sondezi. Starting as a groundswoman 20 years ago, she ha...

item.title: Key Developments in Philippine Politics and Economy on April 10, 2026
item.description: Today’s top stories in the Philippines focus on government transparency, political maneuvering, economic updates, and international buzz. Malacañang firmly denied circulating rumors that the live foot...

item.title: Europe Faces Jet Fuel Shortage in Three Weeks, Airport Group Warns
item.description: Europe is on the brink of a major jet-fuel shortage, with concerns mounting that the crisis will hit within the next three weeks if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. A report from ACI Europe, the r...

item.title: Fremantle Dockers edge Collingwood in tight Adelaide Oval clash
item.description: Fremantle Dockers continued their streak of nail-biting finishes with a hard-fought six-point victory over Collingwood at Adelaide Oval. Despite a below-par performance and numerous errors early in th...

item.title: Concerns Over Pete Hegseth’s Qualifications and Conduct as Defence Secretary
item.description: Pete Hegseth, former Fox News host, has drawn significant criticism for his tenure as US defence secretary, with experts highlighting his lack of high-level military experience and controversial publi...

item.title: Pakistan Prepares High-Security Measures for US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad
item.description: Islamabad entered a heightened state of security as it prepared to host critical negotiations aimed at ending the conflict between the United States and Iran. The Pakistani government deployed army an...

item.title: Experts warn against olive oil detox craze popular among Kenyans
item.description: Lately, a growing number of Kenyans have taken to drinking small shots of olive oil every day, believing it helps ‘cleanse’ the body and remove toxins. The trend, largely driven by social media influe...

item.title: ANC introduces competency-based process for selecting mayors ahead of 2026 local elections
item.description: The ANC has announced a significant overhaul of its mayoral candidate selection process ahead of the 2026 local government elections. Secretary-General Fikile Mbalula outlined that the party will comb...
